name_en: High quality! Small size 🎖️👍👍CHAENL✦ 24C Double Gold Ball Flap Bag Black
name_cn:
High quality! Small size 🎖️👍👍CHAENL✦ 24C Double Gold Ball Flap Bag Black
Uses smooth original factory patent calfskin ✨ Fine touch and glossy feel, paired with vintage hardware, easily creating a retro yet stylish feel. Every detail exudes sophistication, low-key and high-end, that's exactly it ♨ Size 📐 19 cm 22 cm
